title: aquilegia vulgaris var. haenkeana
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. haenkeana, also known as the East Himalayan columbine, is a variety of the common columbine plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Aquilegia vulgaris var. haenkeana can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it has also been used in herbal teas and salves.
